# technitium_dns_settings (Data Source)

Retrieves the current Technitium DNS Server settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dns_settings" "current" {}

output "dns_server_domain" {
  value = data.technitium_dns_settings.current.dns_server_domain
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier for the settings (always `settings`).
- `dns_server_domain` (String) The primary domain name used by this DNS Server.
- `dns_server_local_end_points` (List of String) Local end points (IP:port) the DNS Server listens on.
- `dns_server_ipv4_source_addresses` (List of String) IPv4 source addresses for outbound DNS requests.
- `dns_server_ipv6_source_addresses` (List of String) IPv6 source addresses for outbound DNS requests.
- `default_record_ttl` (Number) The default TTL value for records.
- `default_ns_record_ttl` (Number) The default TTL value for NS records.
- `default_soa_record_ttl` (Number) The default TTL value for SOA records.
- `default_responsible_person` (String) The default SOA Responsible Person email address.
- `use_soa_serial_date_scheme` (Boolean) Use date scheme for SOA serial.
- `min_soa_refresh` (Number) Minimum SOA Refresh interval in seconds.
- `min_soa_retry` (Number) Minimum SOA Retry interval in seconds.
- `zone_transfer_allowed_networks` (List of String) IP/network addresses allowed to perform zone transfer.
- `notify_allowed_networks` (List of String) IP/network addresses allowed to send notify.
- `dns_apps_enable_automatic_update` (Boolean) Allow DNS server to automatically update DNS Apps.
- `prefer_ipv6` (Boolean) Use IPv6 for querying whenever possible.
- `enable_udp_socket_pool` (Boolean) Enable UDP socket pool.
- `udp_payload_size` (Number) Maximum EDNS UDP payload size.
- `dnssec_validation` (Boolean) Enable DNSSEC validation.
- `edns_client_subnet` (Boolean) Enable EDNS Client Subnet.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv4_prefix_length` (Number) EDNS Client Subnet IPv4 prefix length.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv6_prefix_length` (Number) EDNS Client Subnet IPv6 prefix length.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv4_override` (String) IPv4 network address override for ECS.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv6_override` (String) IPv6 network address override for ECS.
- `qpm_limit_sample_minutes` (Number) Client query stats sample size in minutes.
- `qpm_limit_udp_truncation_percentage` (Number) Percentage of TC responses when QPM limit exceeds.
- `qpm_limit_bypass_list` (List of String) IP/network addresses allowed to bypass QPM limit.
- `client_timeout` (Number) Timeout in milliseconds before ServerFailure response.
- `tcp_send_timeout` (Number) Max TCP send timeout in milliseconds.
- `tcp_receive_timeout` (Number) Max TCP receive timeout in milliseconds.
- `quic_idle_timeout` (Number) QUIC idle connection timeout in milliseconds.
- `quic_max_inbound_streams` (Number) Max inbound streams per QUIC connection.
- `listen_backlog` (Number) Maximum pending inbound connections.
- `max_concurrent_resolutions_per_core` (Number) Max concurrent resolutions per CPU core.
- `web_service_local_addresses` (List of String) Web service listen addresses.
- `web_service_http_port` (Number) Web console HTTP port.
- `web_service_enable_tls` (Boolean) HTTPS enabled for web service.
- `web_service_enable_http3` (Boolean) HTTP/3 enabled for web service.
- `web_service_http_to_tls_redirect` (Boolean) HTTP to HTTPS redirection enabled.
- `web_service_use_self_signed_tls_certificate` (Boolean) Self-signed TLS certificate in use.
- `web_service_tls_port` (Number) Web console HTTPS port.
- `web_service_tls_certificate_path` (String) Path to web service TLS certificate.
- `web_service_real_ip_header` (String) HTTP header for client IP behind reverse proxy.
- `enable_dns_over_udp_proxy` (Boolean) DNS-over-UDP-PROXY enabled.
- `enable_dns_over_tcp_proxy` (Boolean) DNS-over-TCP-PROXY enabled.
- `enable_dns_over_http` (Boolean) DNS-over-HTTP enabled.
- `enable_dns_over_tls` (Boolean) DNS-over-TLS enabled.
- `enable_dns_over_https` (Boolean) DNS-over-HTTPS enabled.
- `enable_dns_over_http3` (Boolean) DNS-over-HTTP/3 enabled.
- `enable_dns_over_quic` (Boolean) DNS-over-QUIC enabled.
- `dns_over_udp_proxy_port` (Number) DNS-over-UDP-PROXY port.
- `dns_over_tcp_proxy_port` (Number) DNS-over-TCP-PROXY port.
- `dns_over_http_port` (Number) DNS-over-HTTP port.
- `dns_over_tls_port` (Number) DNS-over-TLS port.
- `dns_over_https_port` (Number) DNS-over-HTTPS port.
- `dns_over_quic_port` (Number) DNS-over-QUIC port.
- `reverse_proxy_network_acl` (List of String) ACL for reverse proxy access.
- `dns_tls_certificate_path` (String) Path to DNS TLS certificate.
- `dns_over_http_real_ip_header` (String) HTTP header for DNS-over-HTTP client IP.
- `recursion` (String) Recursion policy.
- `recursion_network_acl` (List of String) ACL for recursion.
- `randomize_name` (Boolean) QNAME randomization enabled.
- `qname_minimization` (Boolean) QNAME minimization enabled.
- `resolver_retries` (Number) Recursive resolver retries.
- `resolver_timeout` (Number) Recursive resolver timeout.
- `resolver_concurrency` (Number) Recursive resolver concurrency.
- `resolver_max_stack_count` (Number) Recursive resolver max stack count.
- `save_cache` (Boolean) Save DNS cache on disk.
- `serve_stale` (Boolean) Serve stale enabled.
- `serve_stale_ttl` (Number) Serve stale TTL in seconds.
- `serve_stale_answer_ttl` (Number) Serve stale answer TTL.
- `serve_stale_reset_ttl` (Number) Serve stale reset TTL.
- `serve_stale_max_wait_time` (Number) Serve stale max wait time.
- `cache_maximum_entries` (Number) Cache maximum entries.
- `cache_minimum_record_ttl` (Number) Cache minimum record TTL.
- `cache_maximum_record_ttl` (Number) Cache maximum record TTL.
- `cache_negative_record_ttl` (Number) Cache negative record TTL.
- `cache_failure_record_ttl` (Number) Cache failure record TTL.
- `cache_prefetch_eligibility` (Number) Cache prefetch eligibility.
- `cache_prefetch_trigger` (Number) Cache prefetch trigger.
- `cache_prefetch_sample_interval_in_minutes` (Number) Cache prefetch sample interval.
- `cache_prefetch_sample_eligibility_hits_per_hour` (Number) Cache prefetch eligibility hits per hour.
- `enable_blocking` (Boolean) Domain blocking enabled.
- `allow_txt_blocking_report` (Boolean) TXT blocking report enabled.
- `blocking_bypass_list` (List of String) Blocking bypass list.
- `blocking_type` (String) Blocking response type.
- `blocking_answer_ttl` (Number) Blocking answer TTL.
- `custom_blocking_addresses` (List of String) Custom blocking addresses.
- `block_list_urls` (List of String) Block list URLs.
- `block_list_update_interval_hours` (Number) Block list update interval in hours.
- `proxy_type` (String) Proxy type.
- `proxy_address` (String) Proxy server address.
- `proxy_port` (Number) Proxy server port.
- `proxy_username` (String) Proxy server username.
- `proxy_bypass` (String) Proxy bypass list.
- `forwarders` (List of String) Forwarder addresses.
- `forwarder_protocol` (String) Forwarder protocol.
- `concurrent_forwarding` (Boolean) Concurrent forwarding enabled.
- `forwarder_retries` (Number) Forwarder retries.
- `forwarder_timeout` (Number) Forwarder timeout.
- `forwarder_concurrency` (Number) Forwarder concurrency.
- `logging_type` (String) Logging type.
- `ignore_resolver_logs` (Boolean) Ignore resolver logs.
- `log_queries` (Boolean) Log queries enabled.
- `use_local_time` (Boolean) Use local time for logging.
- `log_folder` (String) Log folder path.
- `max_log_file_days` (Number) Max log file days.
- `enable_in_memory_stats` (Boolean) In-memory stats enabled.
- `max_stat_file_days` (Number) Max stat file days.
